channel.title: Better Stuff Blog
channel.description: Tools, insights, and community for makers who refuse to settle. Ship better products, faster.

item.title: Why Product Reviews Are Broken (And What Makers Can Do About It)
item.description: The review ecosystem is failing both consumers and creators. Here's what's wrong and how makers can build trust in a post-review world.

item.title: Best Maker Tools 2026: The Complete Guide
item.description: A comprehensive guide to the best tools for makers in 2026 — from prototyping to launch and beyond.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Product to Build
item.description: A practical framework for deciding what to build next, based on market demand, your skills, and real validation signals.

item.title: How to Measure Product Impact: Metrics That Actually Matter
item.description: Stop tracking vanity metrics. Here are the product metrics that actually tell you if you're building something people want.

item.title: The Product Quality Checklist for Makers
item.description: A practical checklist to ensure your product meets high quality standards before you ship it to users.

item.title: How to Ship Better Products Faster
item.description: Practical strategies for shipping higher-quality products without slowing down. Speed and quality aren't opposites.
